questions.question:
Y ou have taken up a project to create night-shelters for homeless
people during the winter season. Within a week of establishing
the shelters, you have received complaints from the residents of
the area about the increase in theft cases with a demand to remove
the shelters. Y ou would

options.a: ask them to lodge a written complaint in the police station.
options.b: assure residents of an enquiry into the matter.
options.c: ask residents to consider the humanitarian effort made.
options.d: continue with the project and ignore their complaint.

questions.question:
Y ou, as an administrative authority, have been approached, by the
daughter-in-law of an influential person regarding harassment by
her in-laws on account of insufficient dowry. Her parents are not
able to approach you because of social pressures. Y ou would

options.a: call the in-laws for an explanation.
options.b: counsel the lady to adjust, given such a circumstance.
options.c: take action after her parents approach you.
options.d: ask her to lodge complaint with the police.
